rows.label: tlk70000051_10_msg0001
rows.name: Well if it isn't our savior!

rows.label: tlk70000051_10_msg0002
rows.name:
Ivan told me how you beefed
up our food supplies.

rows.label: tlk70000051_10_msg0003
rows.name:
Now I can finally eat all I want.
I've twice a normal person's appetite,
you know. It's a problem.
